title: Update CLAUDE.md bead state exclusion documentation
description: Update the 'Bead state exclusion' subsection inside the Conventions section of CLAUDE.md. Replace the current description — which references the chore commit and git rm --cached untracking — with the new mechanism: bead state isolation now comes from (1) info/exclude written by _write_worktree_exclude, which hides untracked bead files from git status for operator ergonomics, and (2) pathspec exclusion in commit_all (:(exclude).takt/beads/**), which prevents worker commits from staging bead state files even when those files remain tracked in the feature branch index. Remove all references to the 'chore: untrack bead state from feature branch [skip ci]' commit and the git rm --cached approach.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md Bead state exclusion subsection describes info/exclude plus pathspec exclusion in commit_all as the mechanism
No mention of chore commit or git rm --cached in the updated subsection
The updated subsection notes that bead state files remain tracked in the feature branch index (inherited from main) and isolation is achieved only at the staging layer
